Local SEO Specialist & Content Writer

About Me

The SEO Specialist Behind Your Rankings

3+ years of focused Local SEO experience. Obsessed with rankings, GBP optimization, and content that converts.

3+ Years
Expert
Orly Momongan

Local SEO Is All I Do.

I'm Orly Momongan, a Local SEO Specialist and SEO Content Writer with over three years of hands-on experience helping local businesses grow their online visibility and rank where it matters most: on Google Maps and in local search results.

My work is centered on the home services and trades industry, because that's where Local SEO creates the most immediate, measurable impact. When a plumber, electrician, or HVAC company ranks in the Map Pack, they get calls. That's the outcome I optimize for.

I specialize in Google Business Profile optimization, local grid rank tracking, citation building, on-page SEO, and writing content that ranks and reads naturally. Every project gets a strategic, data-driven approach with no guesswork.

Local SEO
Google Business Profile
Map Pack Optimization
SEO Content Writing
On-Page SEO
Citation Building
Local Grid Rank Tracking
Keyword Research
Home Services SEO
Trades Industry
My Approach

Why Clients Keep Coming Back

🎯
Results-First
Every decision is measured against one question: does this improve rankings and generate calls?
🔍
Niche Focus
I specialize in home services and trades because deep focus beats shallow generalism every time.
📊
Data-Driven
Grid maps, GSC data, and rank tracking tell the real story. I let numbers guide every optimization.
💬
Clear Communication
No jargon, no vanishing acts. You get clear reports, honest timelines, and direct communication.

Services

Local SEO Services That Generate Calls

Every service is purpose-built for local businesses. No generic packages. Focused, strategic, and built around your market.

How It Works

From Audit to Rankings

01
Discovery Call
We talk through your business, goals, competition, and current SEO situation.
02
Audit & Strategy
Full audit of your GBP, website, and local rankings. A clear roadmap is built.
03
Implementation
On-page, GBP, citations, content. Every optimization executed with precision.
04
Track & Improve
Grid maps and GSC data guide ongoing improvements to protect and grow your rankings.
Core Service
📍
Local SEO
Comprehensive local search optimization targeting the exact keywords your customers use. Deep on local signals, NAP consistency, and geo-targeted content.
  • Local keyword research and mapping
  • NAP consistency audit and cleanup
  • Geo-targeted page optimization
  • Local schema markup implementation
Core Service
🗂️
Google Business Profile Optimization
Your GBP is the most important local ranking factor. I optimize every element from categories and services to photos, Q&A, and review responses.
  • Full GBP setup or optimization audit
  • Category and attribute optimization
  • Photo strategy and implementation
  • Regular post publishing and Q&A management
Content
✍️
SEO Content Writing
Locally-optimized content written to rank and convert. Blog posts, service pages, location pages, and thought leadership for home services and beyond.
  • Service page and location page copy
  • Keyword-targeted blog articles
  • E-E-A-T optimized content structure
  • Industry expertise for trades clients
Ranking
🗺️
Map Pack Optimization
Using local grid rank tracking tools, I identify exactly where you're ranking and where you're losing visibility. Then I build a targeted plan to take those positions back.
  • Grid rank tracking and reporting
  • Competitor gap analysis
  • Citation building for local authority
  • Review strategy and velocity improvement
Technical
🔍
On-Page SEO
Technical and content on-page optimizations that tell Google exactly what your pages are about and who they should be shown to.
  • Title tag and meta description optimization
  • Header structure and content optimization
  • Internal linking and anchor text strategy
  • Local schema and structured data
Strategy
📋
SEO Audit
A thorough audit of your website and GBP with a clear, prioritized action plan. Ideal for businesses that want to understand their current SEO situation before investing.
  • Full GBP audit and recommendations
  • Technical SEO issue identification
  • Competitor benchmarking
  • Prioritized action roadmap
Get a Free Consultation →
